summary: Iteration 56: Standard Weather Entry Quality Tests completed. All 32 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: Entry Quality Summary component in Lifecycle tab shows SELECTIVITY badge, 4 metric cards (Signals Passed, Rejected, Avg Edge, Avg Lead), rejection breakdown (Low Quality, Low Edge Long, Long Hold Penalty), and config thresholds at bottom. Previous features (lifecycle mode control, exit candidates, simulator, dashboard) all still functional.

backend_api_tests: Entry quality response has config field - PASS
Entry quality response has rejections field - PASS
Entry quality response has passed_signals field - PASS
Entry quality response has open_positions field - PASS
Asymmetric config separate from standard entry quality - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Entry Quality Summary component exists (data-testid='entry-quality-summary') - PASS
Rejection counter 'Low Edge Long' (data-testid='eq-rej-edge-long') exists - PASS
Rejection counter 'Long Hold Penalty' (data-testid='eq-rej-long-hold') exists - PASS
'Standard Weather Entry Quality' title visible - PASS
Lifecycle mode control component exists - PASS
Mode buttons (off, tag_only, shadow_exit, auto_exit) exist - PASS

details: GET /api/strategies/weather/entry-quality returns config, rejections, passed_signals, open_positions
All fields present with correct structure and data types
Asymmetric uses different config (max_market_price, min_model_prob, min_edge)
Entry quality filters do NOT apply to asymmetric signals
4 metric cards: Signals Passed, Rejected, Avg Edge, Avg Lead
3 rejection breakdown counters: Low Quality, Low Edge Long, Long Hold Penalty
Lifecycle mode control with 4 buttons still works

test_credentials: None required - paper mode, no auth
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (54 open weather positions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified Standard Weather Entry Quality feature. Key findings: (1) GET /api/strategies/weather/entry-quality returns config, rejections, passed_signals, open_positions. (2) Config contains: min_quality_score=0.35, min_edge_bps_long=700, long_resolution_hours=24, time_preference_weight=0.15, long_hold_penalty=0.20. (3) Rejections tracks: low_quality, low_edge_long, long_hold_penalty counters. (4) passed_signals tracks: total, avg_quality, avg_edge_bps, avg_lead_hours. (5) open_positions shows: count, avg_profit_multiple, avg_edge_at_entry_bps, avg_hours_to_resolution. (6) GET /api/strategies/weather/health includes entry_quality section. (7) Entry quality filters do NOT affect asymmetric weather signals (verified asymmetric endpoint still works). (8) Frontend shows EntryQualitySummary component in Lifecycle tab with SELECTIVITY badge, 4 cards, rejection breakdown, and config thresholds. (9) All previous features (lifecycle mode control, exit candidates, simulator, dashboard) still functional. (10) Currently 54 open weather positions, mode is TAG_ONLY.
